content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1536: Turning Hostile

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

“Get into its soul!”

Shi Yan’s ear-piercing scream hit this bright world. The space sounded like it was cracking. It seemed like the wall between earth and heaven exploded and created a crack.

Holding the chain made of Skyfall Star River, Shi Yan’s ferocious, giant body was like a beast in its human form. His entire body was covered in rigid, scaly armor and his eyes were red. The ocean that had shrouded several stars here couldn’t conceal his brutal, bloodthirsty aura. A vivid red blood column shot out from his head and broke the sea.

A group of warriors at First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm including Neptune, Keith, Xiao Lie, and Jia Nie was hiding by a broken asteroid near that immense ocean. They were afraid that Yuan could find them if the water touched them.

Suddenly, a blood column shot up into the sky and sent the word-destroying aura everywhere. All the warriors in the territory were dumbstruck.

Labitte discolored and screamed, “Blood Soul Sea of the Death power Upanishad!”

“What about it?” Jia Nie’s voice was cold.

“The Blood Soul Sea can subdue souls. It gathers negative energies and makes the souls of the creatures sink into bloodthirsty, crazy desires. That blood column is the pure, condensed Blood Soul Sea. It’s really extreme. Normal people will have their minds distorted and sink into an endless nightmare of killing until they don’t have a bit of energy left in them.”

Labitte knew the formidable supernatural abilities of the Death power Upanishad. He added with a heavy voice, “Also, the moment you are sober is when you die. The negative energy from the Blood Soul Sea has already entered your soul altar and cut off your vitality at that point. Your soul will perish like that.”

“Is that Shi Yan?” Jia Nie looked interested, her eyes bright. “I heard from Judy that he’s a new prominent face in the Sea Domain of Nihility recently. He’s from some territory outside. Is he really fierce?”

As she was late, she didn’t see Shi Yan fight and kill Ferrell. She hadn’t seen his brutality. Thus, her understanding of Shi Yan was limited to Judy’s description.

However, she thought that Judy had exaggerated Shi Yan’s intimidation. She didn’t think that a kid’s name could spread out in one night by suppressing a famous expert of the Sea Domain of Nihility.

After that, Jia Nie found Neptune, Keith, and Labitte darken their faces. She was more curious.

“You will see how bold he is.” Labitte sighed bitterly but explained nothing.

Jia Nie smiled, her beautiful face surprised. “Oh, I do want to see how a kid gives you three a headache. He seems interesting. I hope he won’t fail me.”

Her exposed skin had so many mysterious patterns, which could change magically according to her moods.

“Get in!”

Deep in the immense ocean where the bright halo shone, Shi Yan used the stars to weave a chain to tie down Hui’s main head. His eyes were red as he roared.

His red eyes looked so terrifying as the negative moods arose in his entire body and accumulated in his eyes. He gazed at Hui’s spooky green eyes. The endless negative energies that naked eyes couldn’t see gushed towards Hui.

He was using his distinct method to suppress Hui’s soul and help Yuan resist against Hui.

He understood better than anybody that only when Zi Yao replaced Hui’s Soul Consciousness to take its body and power did Zi Yao have a chance to survive.

Otherwise, wherever Zi Yao hid, even if she was in an extremely remote territory, Hui could still capture her or erase her soul within one second.

Even if he killed Hui, he couldn’t change that result because Zi Yao was a part of Hui. If Hui died, Zi Yao would perish. Her Life Sea would vanish altogether!

It wasn’t different from Desolate and the other creatures in Desolate Territory. If Desolate died utterly, all the creatures in Desolate Territory including Xia Xin Yan, Yang Tian Emperor, Audrey, Ming Hao, and Xuan He would die altogether. Their lives were given by Desolate with Desolate’s soul imprint.

If Desolate died, none of them could escape a sudden death.

The only way was to bite back at Desolate and use his co-soul to refine Desolate. Shi Yan had to replace Desolate to untie this deadly consequences.

“He’s right. It’s your only chance. If you miss it, you will never have another chance to try.”

Seeing Zi Yao in a daze when she saw Shi Yan’s Absolute Beginning body, Forefather Dragon Lizard reminded her as he hadn’t left yet. He looked at Zi Yao and said, “Both Yuan and Shi Yan are consuming a lot of energy because of you. They are facing a fatal danger. The more you hesitate, the more dangers Shi Yan will have to face.”

He hit it!

“If I hesitate, Shi Yan will face more dangers?” Zi Yao discolored. She became extremely restless.

Forefather Dragon Lizard was moved. He said immediately, “Yeah, it’s true. Your hesitation will make Shi Yan lose a lot of energy!”

He knew that Shi Yan could risk his life for hers and she would do the same for him. She finally got over her rooted fear of Hui!

“I got it!”

Zi Yao’s eyes became resolute. She sat cross-legged on the throne and closed her eyes.

Her soul and Hui had a magical connection; she could use it to enter Hui’s head without leaving her own body.

Feeling her soul energy subside, Forefather Dragon Lizard knew that she has taken action. She had entered Hui’s head. For Shi Yan, she had ignored the fear in her soul and sank into that endless nightmare to engage in the most dangerous fight against Hui’s soul.

“She’s taking action!” screamed Forefather Dragon Lizard.

Shi Yan in his giant body shook hard when he heard Forefather Dragon Lizard scream. Fist-sized stars emerged from his body. Tens of thousands of those stars were created by the God power in his acupuncture points. The stars emitted an aura that could purify souls and bodies. They finally illuminated this dark sky.

Boom! Boom! Boom!

Tens of thousands of bright stars bloomed on the star chain. The starlight fell like a waterfall and hit Hui’s main head. The star chain was like shackles that tied Hui’s main head.

At the same time, the blood column on Shi Yan’s head shrank, gathered with the red halos in his eyes and shot towards Hui’s eyes.

His engagement had reduced Yuan’s pressure. Previously, he couldn’t even create a human form. When Shi Yan had used his Absolute Beginning body to risk his life with Hui, Yuan Zu reappeared by Yuan’s head.

Yuan Zu smiled happily and screamed at Shi Yan. “Use the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower to subdue it! Place it on Hui’s main head. When you use the energy of the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, you can tie down its soul. Your woman can easily refine it then. Trust me! Use you Power Upanishad Symbol Tower to subdue it now!”

As Shi Yan was using the star chains to confine Hui’s head, he didn’t hesitate to release the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower when he heard Yuan Zu.

As soon as the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was released, it became a formidable hundreds-of-level tower that hovered above the snake head.

Slowly moving, countless symbols on the tower wiggled and released a holy aura that could purify the world. Layers of light energy fell on Hui’s main head. As the snake was struggling hard to get rid of the star shackle, it became weaker when the lights shrouded it.

Hui’s soul seemed to be subdued too. It didn’t wiggle a lot anymore!

Yuan’s pressure was reduced greatly. Yuan Zu’s vague body finally materialized.

“Yeah! That’s it! Use the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower to subdue it; it won’t be able to escape. Your woman will have the chance to absorb its soul. Let her replace it and take everything from it!” Yuan Zu smiled tenderly as he exhaled in relief.

His body flashed and Yuan Zu came to Forefather Dragon Lizard, smiling at him. “Well, you shouldn’t stay here. You should have listened to him and left earlier.”

Forefather Dragon Lizard was dumbstruck. “What do you mean?”

“It’s really dangerous if you stay.” While Yuan Zu was talking, the energy in his body churned.

Since Shi Yan was using his energy massively and even the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower to deal with Hui. Yuan Zu had extra energy to use now.

“What danger?” Forefather Dragon Lizard was bewildered. “You guys have subdued Hui. As long as its soul is taken, it won’t be a threat anymore.”

“You’re in danger because of me. Haha.” Yuan Zu’s smiling face turned sinisterly strange. His aura suddenly turned dry and smelled like lava.

“Ancestor! My Ancestor’s smell!” Forefather Dragon Lizard screamed in fearand bewilderment.

“Yeah. I ate your Ancestor Lizard. Let me take you to meet him.” Yuan Zu was still smiling tenderly but in Forefather Dragon Lizard’s eyes, he was extremely ominous.
